title: Xtra Crispy Algerian Chicken Roast
description: A yeasty and crispy Algerian dish featuring coconut flakes, perfect for a low-carb dinner. This recipe is energizing and full of flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a small bowl, mix together the yeast, garlic powder, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the coconut flakes to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Rinse the chicken thighs and pat them dry with paper towels.
Brush the chicken thighs with olive oil and sprinkle the coconut flake mixture evenly over both sides of the chicken.
Place the chicken thighs on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the chicken in the preheated oven for 30 minutes.
Reduce the oven temperature to 375 degrees Fahrenheit and continue baking for an additional 20 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
